column1: # lab-traffic.tsv — Traffic generation data for proxmox-lab
#   profile : profile name (fileserver, webapp, email, monitoring, devops, database,
#   value   : URL (without https://), provider name, prompt text, or test name
#   enabled : yes | no  (optional — defaults to yes if column is absent)
# URL values: store without https:// prefix. The generator prepends https:// at
# script-build time. If you include https:// or http:// it will be stripped first.
# security_test rows: all applicable tests for each profile are listed explicitly,
# including disabled ones, so the full picture is visible before deployment.
# Enable or disable tests here, or toggle them via the in-script profile viewer.
# genai_provider / genai_prompt rows only appear for profiles that generate GenAI
# Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored by the parser.
